genre_refs: rogues-gallery / 'Worst of the Week' recurring series
description: Designed vertical card from ICE's recurring 'Worst of the Week' series. On a black ribbed background, twelve booking-style mugshot photographs are arranged around the edges in roughly four rows, each framed with a dark caption bar stating a charge. Labels include (top row) 'Deadly Conduct', 'Aggravated Assault', 'Assault', 'Assault'; (next) 'Robbery', 'Deadly Conduct'; (next) 'Cocaine Possession', 'Sex w/ Minor'; (bottom row) 'Hit-and-Run', 'Rape', 'Fraud', 'Child Sexual Assault'. The subjects are mostly men of varying apparent ethnicities. Centered is a large white serif title 'Worst' over 'Week', with 'of the' in white on a red angled banner. At bottom-left is a red banner with the URL 'ice.gov/WoW'; at bottom-right are the DHS seal and white 'ICE' wordmark.
notable_text: Worst of the Week; Deadly Conduct; Aggravated Assault; Assault; Robbery; Cocaine Possession; Sex w/ Minor; Hit-and-Run; Rape; Fraud; Child Sexual Assault; ice.gov/WoW
